text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket got a failing grade recently, so I'm
keeping her company as she studies for her
makeup exam.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hrmmmm... I don't get this at all...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Substitute the numbers? What does that mean?
Find the... "sum"? Of the "variables"? What the
heck?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No, this is no good! If I give up here, I won't be
able to train and enter races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I've just gotta go all-out and get this done!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Huh? Whoaaa, my head hurts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of having to struggle with studying, trying
too hard gives Winning Ticket a headache...
